chunks.title: Gathering Stones and Crossing Completion
chunks.reason: Narrative of Joshua's command to gather stones, the completion of the crossing, and the arrival at Gilgal.

chunks.title: Priests Exit the Jordan
chunks.reason: Direct exchange between Yahweh and Joshua regarding the priests coming up from the river.

chunks.title: Setting Up Stones at Gilgal
chunks.reason: Account of setting up stones and Joshua's speech explaining the miracle to future generations.
